metadata.integration_branch_role: V1.29 iteration integration — QC/QA Working branch

cross_cutting.title: rand 0.7.3 cannot be upgraded — blocked by wiremock → http-types upstream
cross_cutting.note: Blocked by wiremock → http-types upstream. Removed from V1.6 scope per V1.6 delivery compass decision.

tech_debt_summary.note: V1.29 shipped. 6 plans Done (archived). 7 V1.29 residuals (R14–R20) open for v1.30. R11/R12/R13 closed.

2026-05-23-v1.26-narrative-kb-persistenc.title: db_err maps all sqlx::Error to ValidationError — no Storage variant
2026-05-23-v1.26-narrative-kb-persistenc.note: Introduce NarrativeError::Storage or Database variant in post-1.0 hardening.

2026-05-23-v1.26-narrative-kb-persistenc.title: KbQuery fetches all blocks into memory then filters in Rust — no DB-level pagination
2026-05-23-v1.26-narrative-kb-persistenc.note: Add LIMIT to list_by_world when needed for scale.

2026-05-23-v1.26-reference-store-layout.title: body.md written before SQL INSERT — orphaned files on DB failure
2026-05-23-v1.26-reference-store-layout.note: Wrap in transaction or write body after SQL INSERT in post-1.0 hardening.

2026-05-23-v1.26-reference-store-layout.title: list_references returns all rows unbounded — no pagination
2026-05-23-v1.26-reference-store-layout.note: Acceptable for pre-release volume. Add LIMIT/OFFSET when needed.

2026-05-23-v1.26-reference-store-layout.title: content_hash always NULL — integrity field unused
2026-05-23-v1.26-reference-store-layout.note: Optional static hash in V1.27 hygiene plan H4.1; full refresh pipeline is DF-44.

v1.29-iteration.title: SessionCapture created at agent-stop time produces near-zero session metrics
v1.29-iteration.note: Create SessionCapture at session start, record message/tool events, and close it on agent_stop.

v1.29-iteration.title: KB extract job claim is not atomic across next_queued + mark_running
v1.29-iteration.note: Wrap queue claim in a transaction/claim helper and add concurrent claim coverage.

v1.29-iteration.title: kb.extract_work is registered but still placeholder-like for full extraction lifecycle
v1.29-iteration.note: Complete job_id-driven mark_running/mark_done/mark_failed wiring and KeyBlock insertion.

v1.29-iteration.title: Persistent child Drop cleanup is best-effort and Unix-only
v1.29-iteration.note: R11 baseline fixed; follow-up to retain child handles or add cross-platform termination.

v1.29-iteration.title: KB extract job IDs use custom timestamp-derived generation
v1.29-iteration.note: Replace with UUIDv4-style IDs while preserving the xj_ prefix.

v1.29-iteration.title: creator command module is approaching maintainability threshold
v1.29-iteration.note: Extract KB command handlers to a dedicated creator/kb.rs module.

v1.29-iteration.title: KB extract status list is unbounded
v1.29-iteration.note: Add LIMIT/pagination or a bounded default for extract-status.
